name: Lake of Masks
quote: "I want to win. I do not yearn to be good."
description: A mystical body of water that reflects not your face, but your deepest illusions, desires, and secrets.
history: A perfectly still, glassy lake hidden in the deeper valleys of Elfhame. Its waters hold high glamour and magic, showing visitors reflections of what they desire, what they fear, or what they hide from themselves.
events: The secret meeting between Jude Duarte and the Ghost to exchange intelligence.
Locke's staged romantic games along the shore.
secrets: The lake water is fed by a spring that drains memories.
The reflection of Jude Duarte shows her holding the High King's crown.
